title: French Fruited Paella
description: A unique twist on the classic Spanish dish, with French flair, featuring fresh fruit.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the paella seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Spanish rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the fruit and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the salty olives and rosemary sprigs. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
